← All IRC handicap examples

IRC — corrected-time order differs from elapsed-time order

CT = ET × TCC; boats rank by lowest corrected time regardless of who crossed first.

Scoring system: IRC    Gun time: 14:05:00 
Start 14:05:00 (= 50700 s since midnight)

Boat 1: finish 15:05:00  ET = 3600 s   CT = 3600 × 1.05 = 3780.00 s  → 3rd
Boat 2: finish 15:12:58  ET = 4078 s   CT = 4078 × 0.88 = 3588.64 s  → 1st
Boat 3: finish 15:08:30  ET = 3810 s   CT = 3810 × 0.95 = 3619.50 s  → 2nd

Boat 2 finished last on elapsed time but wins on corrected time.
RankNameSail #TCCFinish timeETTCFCTPoints
1 Beta 2 0.880 15:12:58 67m 58s 0.8800 59m 49s 1
2 Gamma 3 0.950 15:08:30 63m 30s 0.9500 60m 20s 2
3 Alpha 1 1.050 15:05:00 60m 00s 1.0500 63m 00s 3
sailscoring.ie
